summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FairFare P0 features. All features working correctly: Premium labels (Favorable/Balanced/Elevated/Peak), Long trip confirmation modal (>150 miles), Deep link 'Opening...' loader, Demand estimate labeling, Surge Likelihood display, and Live price message.
passed_tests: Backend: API root endpoint returns 200 OK
Backend: Premium labels (Favorable/Balanced/Elevated/Peak) returned instead of old labels (Cheap/Moderate/Busy)
Backend: Surge likelihood values (Low/Moderate/High) working
Backend: Long trip (>150 miles) returns requires_confirmation: true with route_status: 'long_trip'
Backend: Short trip (<150 miles) does NOT require confirmation
Backend: Medium trip (~100 miles) does NOT require confirmation
Backend: Very long routes (>1000 miles) rejected with 400 error (geocoding sanity check)
Backend: Cross-country routes rejected
Backend: Missing pickup coordinates returns 400
Backend: Missing destination coordinates returns 400
Backend: Decision hint with contextual advice present
Backend: Availability (Good/Limited/Busy) present
Backend: No numeric prices in response
Backend: Deep links for Uber and Lyft present
Backend: Distance and duration in response
Backend: Route status in response
Backend: Coordinate info in response
Frontend: Premium label 'Favorable' displayed with green color
Frontend: 'DEMAND ESTIMATE' label shown (not just 'Demand')
Frontend: 'Surge Likelihood: Low' displayed as separate line
Frontend: 'Live price shown in app' message displayed
Frontend: FairFare Pick card visible
Frontend: Uber and Lyft cards visible
Frontend: Long trip modal appears for routes >150 miles
Frontend: Modal shows 'Long Trip Detected' title
Frontend: Modal shows distance and duration
Frontend: Modal has 'Yes, Continue' button
Frontend: Modal has 'Go Back' button
Frontend: 'Yes, Continue' proceeds to results page
Frontend: 'Go Back' closes modal and returns to input (preserves form data)
Frontend: 'Continue in Uber' button present
Frontend: 'Continue in Lyft' button present
Frontend: Opening app overlay element present for deep link loader
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 features verified working: 1) Premium labels (Favorable/Balanced/Elevated/Peak) with correct colors (green/yellow/orange/red), 2) Long trip modal for routes >150 miles with 'Yes, Continue' and 'Go Back' buttons, 3) Routes >1000 miles still rejected, 4) 'Demand estimate' label shown, 5) 'Surge Likelihood' as separate line, 6) 'Live price shown in app' message, 7) Deep link buttons with 'Opening...' loader state. Backend is entirely MOCKED - no real Uber/Lyft API calls.
mocked_api_note: Backend is entirely MOCKED - no real Uber/Lyft API calls. Decision engine uses time-based heuristics for demand/surge indicators.
